sections.title: Work Experience
sections.subtitle: 4+ years building scalable web applications for US-based teams across Ecuador and the United States.

catalog.title: Full Stack Development & Automation
catalog.subtitle: Built and deployed React + TypeScript landing pages, designed NestJS + Angular full stack apps with microservices architecture on MongoDB and PostgreSQL, and automated business workflows using N8N and Microsoft Power Platform.

catalog.title: HR Management Web App
catalog.subtitle: Built a BambooHR-inspired HR management app using C# .NET MVC with MS SQL, including role-based access control and employee management modules.

catalog.title: Automotive Repricing & Web Systems
catalog.subtitle: Built Azure HTTP Trigger functions for automotive parts repricing using Python (SQLAlchemy, NumPy, Pandas), refactored web systems with C# .NET MVC on Azure, and wrote technical documentation in English.

catalog.title: Internal Software Products
catalog.subtitle: Led development of 3 internal software products including real-time inventory control systems and IoT price tags.

sections.title: Experiencia Laboral
sections.subtitle: 4+ años construyendo aplicaciones web escalables para equipos en EE.UU. desde Ecuador y Estados Unidos.

catalog.title: Desarrollo Full Stack & Automatización
catalog.subtitle: Construí y desplegué landing pages con React + TypeScript, diseñé apps full stack con NestJS + Angular en arquitectura de microservicios con MongoDB y PostgreSQL, y automaticé flujos de negocio con N8N y Microsoft Power Platform.

catalog.title: App de Gestión de RRHH
catalog.subtitle: Construí una app web de RRHH inspirada en BambooHR con C# .NET MVC y MS SQL, incluyendo control de acceso por roles y módulos de gestión de empleados.

catalog.title: Repricing Automotriz & Sistemas Web
catalog.subtitle: Construí funciones Azure HTTP Trigger para repricing de partes automotrices con Python (SQLAlchemy, NumPy, Pandas), refactoricé sistemas web con C# .NET MVC en Azure y redacté documentación técnica en inglés.
